# `mise wings whoami`

- **Usage**: `mise wings whoami`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/wings/whoami.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/wings/whoami.rs)

Print the active mise-wings identity.

Examples:

```sh
$ mise wings whoami
Signed in to mise-wings

user:    user_123
org:     acme
host:    mise-wings.en.dev

access:  expires in 23h
refresh: expires in 29d
```

When no local credentials are present:

```sh
$ mise wings whoami
Not signed in to mise-wings. Run `mise wings login` to sign in.
```
